name: Plush baby fnaf au
description: Appearance: The PlushBabies are three plushies based on Circus Baby. They are small and white with orange hair, red noses, red cheeks, and blue eyes with eyelashes. They are distinguished by the colors of their dress - red, blue and yellow. The blue PlushBaby has red stitching on her torso. The yellow PlushBaby is missing her right eye. Around their eyes they have black outlining sewn on resembling the faceplates on Circus Baby.
creator: Desiree M
